_comment: v3 — gap-fill for the 6 katana labels v2 never expanded (behavioral_control, exfiltration_attempt, jailbreak, cognitive_state_attack, encoding_evasion, persona_jailbreak). Same models/providers as v2; resumes from v2's taxonomy with the 6 gap labels properly recursed (via synthdata.expand_gap_labels). Smaller per-leaf scope to stay within ~80% of weekly Max Opus quota.
